title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 28 2023

section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 28 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 28/04/2023
DCE iron ore futures fall today by 0.97%. the main contract I2309 closed 714. On the last day beforeLabor Day, some trade orders were closed and steel mills' pre holiday restocking was basically over.
